markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.306 — Members and Former Members of Merchant Marine of the United States

The department shall issue specialty license plates for members and former members of the merchant marine of the United States. The license plates must include the words “Merchant Marine.”

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1135 (H.B.2741), Sec. 78, eff. September 1, 2013.*

subsections.text: The department shall issue specialty license plates for members and former members of the merchant marine of the United States. The license plates must include the words “Merchant Marine.”
